_comment: Single AWS MCP entry via the MCP Proxy for AWS (mcp-proxy-for-aws), which signs requests with your local AWS credentials (SigV4) and connects to the managed AWS MCP Server. To enable, change 'disabled' to false. Pinned to a specific proxy version on purpose — avoid '@latest'. '--read-only' blocks mutating tools; remove it when you need the agent to provision/modify AWS resources. Set the endpoint/region to your preferred AWS region. Requires 'uv' and valid AWS credentials. See docs/mcp-servers.md.
